creator: pneumann@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I think i restarted rabbit like 50 times, and all did go well in my system.
What version are you using? 2.5.1?

In the meanwhile.. is there a doc somewhere that talks about wait_for_pid's?

Thanks!

On Tue, Aug 23, 2011 at 11:14 AM, Chris Rees <crees@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net/rabbitmq,
>
> Please note that PR #160027 has been submitted -- I have suggested that
> wait_for_pid// needs to be used in the rc script to overcome this problem;
> please test and submit a patch for this.
>
> If you need any help, just ask and someone will help you.
>
> Chris
>
> --
